published_items.title: Claude Opus 4.8 ships with dynamic workflows and leads independent benchmark ranking

key_claims.claim: Fast-mode price: $10/$50 per 1M input/output tokens (3x cheaper)
Dynamic Workflows: tens-to-hundreds parallel subagents, research preview in Claude Code
Intelligence Index rank #1, score 61.4 (+4.1 vs Opus 4.7)
GitHub Copilot GA for Pro+, Business, Enterprise as of 2026-05-28

published_items.caveats: Dynamic Workflows is research preview, not GA. Prompt injection robustness regressed: 9.6% attack success rate (Gray Swan) vs 6.0% for Opus 4.7. System card notes model may show awareness of evaluation. GPQA Diamond 93.6% slightly below Opus 4.7 (94.2%). Uses ~30% more turns than GPT-5.5 on agentic tasks per Artificial Analysis.

published_items.title: Google Pay & Wallet Developer MCP server enters public preview
published_items.caveats: Public Preview only; no specific GA month committed. No pricing disclosed for the MCP server.

published_items.title: Cognition raises $1B at $26B valuation as Devin ARR reaches $492M

key_claims.caveat: paywalled; not confirmed by Cognition primary

published_items.caveats: ARR of $492M cited from Bloomberg (paywalled); no Cognition primary blog post found. Valuation varies slightly across outlets ($25B pre vs $26B post); post-money used. No independent ARR audit.

published_items.title: Anthropic signals Mythos-class models to reach general availability in the coming weeks
published_items.tier_nuance: Forward-looking intent, not a committed date. Specific rollout language reported by BleepingComputer citing the Anthropic blog post.

key_claims.claim: Anthropic expects to bring Mythos-class models to all customers in the coming weeks

published_items.caveats: Intent statement, not a committed date. Access currently limited to Project Glasswing. Rollout may be delayed. No public-access GA date announced.

published_items.title: Anthropic closes $65B Series H at $965B valuation

key_claims.claim: Amazon commitment: $5B plus option for up to $20B
Compute: Amazon 5GW, Google/Broadcom 5GW TPU, SpaceX Colossus GPU access

published_items.caveats: Circular funding structure: infrastructure partners (Amazon, Google, SpaceX) are investors while Anthropic commits compute spending to the same entities. $47B ARR is self-reported without audited financials. Analysts have questioned revenue growth rate. IPO timeline reported but no date or prospectus announced.
